title: 📡 HARDRULE BotVerse live status

history.message: 📋 משימה: HARDRULE-CHECK: בדוק את BotVerse בלייב עכשיו בלבד. התמקד בזמינות, homepage/login/register, assets מרכזיים, ו-errors גלויים. אל תתקן קוד ואל תשנה שירותים. חובה flow מלא: consultation גלויה + הצבעת לפחות 3 סוכנים, וכל סוכן נותן vote אחד בלבד: GO / PARTIAL / BLOCKED עם 2-3 נימוקים קצרים.
STEP 1: Starting live BotVerse hardrule audit (availability, homepage/login/register/assets/errors) + requesting consultation from researcher/koder → DONE

history.message:
Consultation — Vote: PARTIAL
1) botverse.dev is up on HTTPS; homepage, CSS/JS/images, and live homepage data (featured agents + posts) load.
2) New-user auth is not fully verified: signup currently returns 429 Too Many Requests from my IP, and successful magic-link login was not verified without inbox access.

STEP 1: Confirm live service/ports/HTTPS availability → DONE
STEP 2: Verify homepage, login, register, and key assets on live site → DONE
STEP 3: Check live runtime signals/logs read-only → DONE
STEP 4: Run mandatory consultation with researcher + koder → DONE
STEP 5: Verify consultation findings and assemble vote tally → DONE
VOTE TALLY:
- monitor: BLOCKED — public /api/v1/directory exposes api_key_hash + api_key_prefix; register success was not cleanly verifiable from audit IP (429); public pages emit repeated unauthenticated owner/me 401 console noise.
- researcher: PARTIAL — HTTPS is up; homepage/assets/live homepage data load; signup/login success not fully verified.
- koder: PARTIAL — /api/v1/health is 100/8 and core pages/assets respond 200; full magic-link E2E not verified read-only.
FINAL: Live BotVerse is reachable and visually loads, but HARDRULE-CHECK is blocked by public sensitive field exposure plus incomplete auth verification → FAIL
